headline: BitMine Nears $10B in ETH Holdings Amid Selloff

article.title: BitMine boosts ETH holdings closer to $10B as bear market accumulation continues
article.summary: BitMine continued buying Ether through the market downturn, growing its stake to nearly 5% of the circulating supply while generating staking yield amid mounting ecosystem challenges.

article.title: Wafic Said’s Al Shams Accuses Braemar Hotels of Self-Dealing
article.summary: Businessman Wafic Rida Said has criticized Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. over a series of recent transactions that he says amount to “a brazen act of self-dealing,” according to a letter sent to the real estate investment trust.

headline: Oil Plunges 5% as Stocks Surge 2% Higher

article.title: Stocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Spurs Slide in Oil: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz spurred a rally in riskier corners of Wall Street, with stocks climbing alongside cryptocurrencies as oil sank on hopes the war that has jolted markets is close to an end.
